locale: en-US (US pages only, American English copy)

capture_guard.description: Each source frame was captured only after full DOM stabilization.
rules: no active CSS/JS transitions or animations
post-click captures wait for the triggered animation + DOM mutation to fully settle before screenshot
extra: isolated browser context (fresh cookies/storage), consent accepted once

us-decreased-prefilled.png.opened_via: click on SolutionCard 'Apply My Coupon' on homepage (hint + prefill 100 / 20 -> 80)

us-decreased-pu-applied.png.opened_via: click on Practical Use 'Sale Discount' pin -> auto-fill 300 / 30 -> 210 + 'Selected Practical Use Example' banner

us-home-search-tip.png.opened_via: focus #calculator-search, type 'tip', BM25 dropdown open (PU + solutions + FAQs)

us-home-tip-result.png.opened_via: click dropdown PU row 'Restaurant Tip' -> scroll to basic calculator, auto-fill 15 / 60 -> 9

timeline_ms.spot: coupon SolutionCard, pad 16px, radius 12, overlay 0.6 fade 0.5s, camera scale 1.2; cursor click on CTA
hint banner -> calculator card -> result $80 with pulsing glow, camera 1.15 -> 1.3
PU 'Sale Discount' row -> click pin -> crossfade to pinned state, spotlight calculator + banner, glow on $210
gaussian-blur everything except search box (fade 0.5s), then crisp window over open dropdown, glow on 'Restaurant Tip' row, cursor click
persistent 0.6 overlay; cutout morphs A(15%) -> B($60) -> C($9), 0.6s morph / 1s hold, camera pans at scale 1.2, glow on result
feathered radial vignette on FAQ hub header/search, then on live FAQ answer (15), camera push 1.12 -> 1.22

timeline_ms.note: brand + 'Eight calculators. Sixty-four interactive FAQs.' + justpercent.com, scale 100->102%

player.qa_params: ?rec hides HUD, ?t=<ms> seeks master clock, ?stop=<ms> auto-pauses
player.seek_semantics: in-scene CSS animations start when the scene gets .on — for mid-scene QA always seek to the scene boundary (?t=<sceneStart>) and use ?stop=
